title: hymenophyllum latisorum
intro: Hymenophyllum latisorum, also known as the broad-lipped filmy fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the genus Hymenophyllum and is native to New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum latisorum include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or decoction by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it is also used in herbal remedies in the form of tinctures or capsules.
